title: NEW! Project Support Analyst - Payments (Contract)
description:
Key Responsibilities

  • Support day-to-day operations of a regional merchant risk program
  • Track and manage a portfolio of merchant cases, ensuring timely follow-up and resolution
  • Ensure timely remediation of identified merchants and escalate findings to the risk team as needed
  • Coordinate email communications with merchants and internal stakeholders regarding program notifications and required actions
  • Monitor responses, validate information received, and escalate findings to the risk team for review
  • Maintain accurate case trackers, documentation, and status updates using Excel and internal systems
  • Support billing and fee notification processes for non-compliant merchants where applicable
  • Perform operational processing tasks, including spreadsheet uploads into internal billing and workflow tools
  • Track program progress, timelines, and outstanding actions to support reporting and governance
  • Assist in identifying process improvements and support automation or tooling initiatives where appropriate

Requirements

  • 3–5 years of experience in operations, program support, project coordination, or PMO-related roles
  • Proficiency in Microsoft Excel; experience with workflow or automation tools is a plus
  • Prior exposure to risk, compliance, payments, or regulated environments

Interested applicants please send your resume in MS Word format and attention it to Rachel Yeo (R22104385).
Shortlisted candidates will be notified
Data provided is for recruitment purposes only
www.ambition.com.sg

postedCompany.description:
Ambition is a leading global recruitment and executive search business operating across key international cities. We access hard-to-find, high-calibre professionals within Banking & Financial Services, Finance & Accounting, Sales & Marketing, Supply Chain & Procurement, and Technology.

We believe our size is a significant differentiation in the recruitment industry. We are big enough to undertake large-scale projects for our clients, yet retain the soul and personality of a smaller company. We are best known for our specialisation with in-depth knowledge and expertise, well-established networks, and deep relationships. We work towards ‘building better futures’ for our clients, candidates and our community.

For more information, please visit www.ambition.com.sg or follow us on Ambition’s social media.
